name: True or False
short_description: Take a quiz to test your intuition and knowledge - and learn some interesting and specific facts along the way!
detailed_description:
From the creator of Pythagoria & Aurora Nights

Take a quiz to test your intuition and knowledge - and learn some interesting and specific facts along the way.

Your goal is simple: decide whether the statements are true or false. Some of them may seem pretty crazy, but they are true; while other "facts" are actually false.

Is there a chocolate-scented flower? You will soon know the answer!

Key Features

  • Over 200 surprising and entertaining facts.

  • Calm and relaxing OST.

  • DRM-free. You can play the game anywhere anytime!

supported_languages: English, Russian, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
